features: Introducing the BIN BRITE Stick-On Bin Freshener, the solution to banishing unpleasant odors and maintaining a fresh environment in your home, office, or any space with a bin. This convenient and effective freshener is a must-have for any area where odors can be a concern.
Odour Elimination: The BIN BRITE Stick-On Bin Freshener is designed to combat and eliminate unpleasant odours, leaving your space smelling clean and fresh.
Long-Lasting: Each freshener provides lasting odour control (30 Days), helping you maintain a pleasant environment for an extended period.
Convenient Design: With its stick-on backing, this freshener can be easily attached to the inside of your bin's lid or any suitable surface, keeping it discreet and out of sight.
Variety of Scents: Choose from a range of scents to suit your preferences and create a pleasant atmosphere.
description: BIN BRITE Stick-On Bin Freshener - Keep Your Space Fresh and Clean. Kitchen Bins : Keep your kitchen smelling fresh and clean, even when disposing of food scraps. Bathroom Bins : Combat bathroom odours effectively, whether in a home or office setting. Office Wastebaskets: Maintain a pleasant workspace by eliminating unpleasant odours from office bins. Diaper Pails: Ideal for use in diaper pails, ensuring a more pleasant nursery or changing area. General Use: Use this freshener in any space where you want to control odours effectively. Why Choose BIN BRITE Stick-On Bin Freshener? This stick-on bin freshener offers a simple and discreet solution to tackle unpleasant odours. It's versatile, easy to use, and available in two delightful scents, allowing you to choose the one that best suits your preferences. Freshen Up Your Space: Click 'Add to Cart' now and say goodbye to unwanted odours with the BIN BRITE Stick-On Bin Freshener. Keep your environment smelling clean and fresh effortlessly, with the option to choose between two fantastic scents: Berry Blast and Citronella & Lemongrass. WHAT IS INCLUDED IN YOUR ORDER: In your order, you will receive 1x Pack of Berry Blast and 1x Pack of Citronella & Lemongrass Stick ON Bin fresheners. Each pack contains two individual fresheners making them 4 in total for each order. Colour May Vary From The Pictures | Please Email Us For More Details.
